title: 2026-01-07 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.80
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-01-07: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.80/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-01-07, the score printed 11.80/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
